figures.caption: Figure 1. Overview of the ScribbleEdit pipeline for dataset construction and model finetuning.
Table 1. Quantitative results on our dataset. Inputs denote scribble (S), text instruction (T), and mask (M). Bold indicates the best result in each column, and underline indicates the second best.
Figure 2. Comparison of editing results across methods. Each row shows one dataset example (Edit Instruction, Original, Scribble, Target) followed by results from four models.
